SEARCH
Package com.example.getoutthere.event

Class Event

java.lang.Object
com.example.getoutthere.event.Event
public class Event extends Object
Represents an Event entity within the application.

This class acts as a Model and Data Transfer Object (DTO) containing all the specifics of an event (name, capacity, dates, waitlist limits). It is designed to be easily serialized and deserialized by Firebase Firestore.

Outstanding Issues: - Currently operates as a pure data container and lacks internal data validation (e.g., ensuring capacity > 0 or that endDate is strictly after startDate) within the setters.

Note: Initial Javadoc and introductory comments generated by Gemini.

    Default constructor required for Firebase Firestore serialization.
